institutional_absurdity_or_gap_pattern: An official police project page makes state involvement visible while leaving procurement, technical-companion, and operational-proof layers unresolved.
bounded_mechanism_statement: ORION is useful as a low-trace edge-case floor because public-body involvement and stated border-management purpose are directly visible, but the current local package still cannot reconstruct procurement, supplier-normalized implementation, or public assessment support.
evidence_tier_now: direct official page reused through shared control surfaces
paper_thesis_use: Methods/thesis floor case for separating project visibility from deployment reconstruction.
figure_table_hook: Table 1B low-rung mechanism row; appendix methods note on project-page ceilings.
dashboard_hook: Traceability ladder low-rung tooltip plus mechanism facet for project-visibility-only rows.
forbidden_overread: Do not restate ORION as procurement-backed deployment, legality proof, or measured operational effectiveness.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Hold unless a public procurement, register, technical, or assessment companion emerges from official surfaces.

institutional_absurdity_or_gap_pattern: A direct regulator notice reveals legal basis and remedy depth after deployment while the buyer-side acquisition chain remains locally invisible.
bounded_mechanism_statement: The Serco row functions as a public-sector edge case because official enforcement text describes biometric-attendance governance failure and destruction/cessation remedies, yet the current package still cannot trace procurement, supplier chain, or a public DPIA companion.

paper_thesis_use: Main-text comparator for governance depth without procurement reconstructability.
figure_table_hook: Table 1B regulator-depth mechanism row; methods/results note on post-deployment authority visibility.
dashboard_hook: Legal-basis-vs-buyer-trace split with enforcement-text mechanism badge.
forbidden_overread: Do not convert regulator notice text into procurement visibility, supplier proof, sector prevalence, or generalized legality conclusions beyond the ICO notice.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Upgrade only if a public buyer-side procurement, contract, supplier, or public assessment companion becomes available.

institutional_absurdity_or_gap_pattern: A direct regulator reprimand exposes process failure and missing DPIA discipline while leaving both buyer-side acquisition and inspectable assessment layers unresolved.
bounded_mechanism_statement: The Chelmer row is an edge-case mechanism row because the reprimand makes deployment timing and Article 35(1) failure public, but the DPIA is discussed rather than attached and no procurement or supplier chain is locally exposed.
evidence_tier_now: direct regulator-document package plus shared claim-support control
paper_thesis_use: Main-text comparator for missing-public-DPIA and process-failure visibility.

next_smallest_publishability_move: Upgrade only if one public school procurement, supplier, or downloadable DPIA/impact-assessment companion appears.

institutional_absurdity_or_gap_pattern: A municipal register can expose supplier, governance, and revision-history fields while still failing to yield a reviewer-checkable buyer-side procurement or downloadable public assessment companion.
bounded_mechanism_statement: Amsterdam is the clearest institutional-absurdity/gap row because the public register is exact-row-rich and bilingual, yet the current tested route set still cannot reconstruct buyer-side acquisition or publicly inspectable companion-document support for the same row.
evidence_tier_now: direct register page plus bounded negative-route probe
paper_thesis_use: Core register exemplar for arguing that machine-readable disclosure does not collapse the reconstruction gap.
